View Profile ↗
01
Not your
average
MBA student.

I got into marketing because I'm obsessed with why people choose things. What makes someone reach for one brand over another? That question has taken me from B-school classrooms to the IIM Indore case circuit to a cosmonaut training centre in Russia.

Today I'm building B2B pipelines at Velocitta Brand Consultancy, organising Swarajya 2026 (a national case competition at FLAME), and studying brands that move people. My background in tech (BCA) means I speak the language of data, not just decks.

Outside the office: bassist who's won inter-college Battle of Bands across four cities. Turns out reading a crowd is the same skill, whether it's an audience or a boardroom.

D2C Brands Brand Strategy Case Competitions SEM/SEO B2B Prospecting Employer Branding Bloomberg Terminal Canva (Advanced) 🎸 Bass Guitar Consumer Insights
